title: stellera dioica
intro: Stellera dioica, also known as the King's Crown or Tartary Cossacks' Bells, is a flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, reducing inflammation, and improving digestion. Stellera dioica is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and extracts, and is also used in some traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
